---
title: "PolicyMap"
page-layout: article
---

# PolicyMap

## Description

Interactive mapping platform combining demographic, housing, health, economic, and policy data from public and proprietary sources. Supports place-based research and spatial analysis.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Geospatial & Mapping Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Health & Biomedical Data
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Geospatial & Mapping Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Health & Biomedical Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://www.policymap.com/newmaps/e/yale)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
